item.title: A message from the Cafeteria:
item.description: The last day for the cafeteria to be open for the school year is May 20th

item.title: A message from Mrs. Kwok:
item.description: There will be a Unity Club meeting today at lunch in room 127. All panelists and supporters are asked to attend.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Curtis:
item.description: If you are in Grade 8 and enjoyed the Lacrosse Workshop in January, please consider signing up for the upcoming Friendship Games! On May 28, we will be bringing 36 Grade 8 students to St. FX to participate in a day of fun lacrosse games and activities. Interested students are asked to see Mrs. Curtis and Ms. Clouthier outside of the 7/8 Resource Room at morning break.

item.title: A message from the Unity Club:
item.description: On Thursday, May 21st, we'll be celebrating Multicultural Day at STA. High school students will be invited to wear traditional clothes from their culture, or dress in the colours of their nation's flag. We will be hosting an international potluck in the cafeteria during the high school lunch. Please scan the QR code on posters around the school to sign up.

item.title: A message from Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Congratulations to our Varsity Ultimate Team, who competed yesterday at the Prescott-Russell Festival at VCI. As STA’s first-ever inaugural Ultimate team, our athletes represented our school with outstanding sportsperson-ship, integrity, and a great attitude throughout the day. Mr. and Mrs. Longval are extremely proud of the team’s effort, openness to learning a new sport, and the way they supported one another. Great job, Ravens!

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Weight Room is Open today at lunch. Drop in for a workout before the long weekend!

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval:
item.description: There will be a brief meeting for all Track and Field Athletes competing at EOSSAA today at lunch (10:35am) in the weight room. It is important for all EOSSAA bound athletes to attend!

item.title: A message from Guidance:
item.description: Grade 12's - it's the last day for nominations for Valedictorian! See the Teams page for the nomination form, as well as other important information pertaining to graduation and prom.
